decisions.decision: Import directly from @/features/assumptions/AssumptionContext (no barrel export exists)
alternatives_rejected: Relative imports (project convention uses @/ alias everywhere)

decisions.decision: Use simple wrapper pattern with renderHook, matching session.test.tsx style — no renderWithProviders needed
alternatives_rejected: Using helpers.tsx renderWithProviders (doesn't include AssumptionProvider, adds unnecessary providers)

decisions.decision: Skip referential stability testing for contextPayload — test functional correctness only
alternatives_rejected: Testing that contextPayload creates new reference each render (over-testing implementation details, out of task scope)

decisions.decision: Use explicit vitest imports (describe, it, expect, vi) for consistency with session.test.tsx
alternatives_rejected: Relying on vitest globals without import (works but inconsistent with existing tests)

decisions.decision: No mocking required — AssumptionContext is pure in-memory state with no external dependencies

steps.task: Create test file at frontend/src/__tests__/AssumptionContext.test.tsx with imports from vitest, @testing-library/react, and @/features/assumptions/AssumptionContext. Define wrapper function using AssumptionProvider.
Write 'initial state' test group: verify assumptions starts as empty array, hasAssumption returns false, getAssumption returns undefined, contextPayload is empty array.

Write 'addAssumption' test group: add single assumption and verify it appears in assumptions array; add multiple assumptions with different variableIds; add assumption with same variableId to verify replace behavior (filters old, appends new, exactly one entry with updated values).
Write 'removeAssumption' test group: add then remove by variableId, verify it's gone; verify removing non-existent variableId is a no-op.
Write 'clearAll' test group: add multiple assumptions then clearAll, verify empty state.
Write 'hasAssumption' and 'getAssumption' test group: verify hasAssumption returns true/false correctly; verify getAssumption returns matching Assumption or undefined.
Write 'contextPayload' test group: add assumptions and verify contextPayload contains only { variableId, outcomeId } (no label field).
Write 'useAssumptions outside provider' test group: verify it throws 'useAssumptions must be used within AssumptionProvider' with console.error suppression pattern from session.test.tsx.
Run vitest on the new test file to confirm all tests pass.
